title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 10 lines).
summary_text: 1. High: [scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L525) removes `quote_tweet_id` and posts quote URLs as plain text. That breaks the documented contract in [x_poster.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/x_poster.py#L55) and [CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md#L111): `fxtwitter.com`/`vxtwitter.com` links will no longer become real quote tweets, and even `x.com/.../status/...` now depends on fragile URL auto-expansion instead of the API’s explicit quote mechanism. 2. Medium: [tests/test_quote_tweet.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_quote_tweet.py#L183) rewrites the scheduler test to assert the regressed behavior rather than the intended one. That weakens coverage around `extract_quote_tweet_id()` integration and makes the suite bless a behavior that contradicts the existing implementation/docs. 3. Low: [scheduler.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L520) comment still says “quote tweet → text + quote_tweet_id” while the code does the opposite. This mismatch will mislead future maintenance and incident debugging. 4. No new security issue stood out in this diff; the main problem is a functional regression in posting semantics.
